calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by Plaintiff. Mark Dawson, Esq. appearing specially for Defendant.

The Court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the Court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The Court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance.

JUDGE SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; Clerk MOlopernes/YMazariegos. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2016 Continued To Dec-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to DEC-20-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. *** NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). *** JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
